summary: Comprehensive testing of timeline click-to-seek functionality for CONSOLE-8X Digital 8-Track Recorder. All reported issues have been successfully fixed - time ruler is fully clickable with perfect seeking accuracy, playhead updates correctly, and all related features work as expected.
passed_tests: Time ruler visible with proper time markers (0:00, 0:10, 0:20, etc.)
Time ruler fully clickable for seeking - 100% accuracy tested at 10%, 30%, 50%, 70%, 90% positions
Playhead position updates correctly on ruler with pink color and glow effect
Edge case testing: clicking at 0% and 100% positions works perfectly (0.0544% and 99.9456% accuracy)
Waveform areas clickable for seeking on all 8 tracks
Zoom controls functional (zoom in/out buttons, zoom level display shows 1.0x to 1.5x)
Navigation arrows present and properly disabled when no scrollable content
Seeking works correctly while zoomed in
Transport controls functional (spacebar play/pause, escape stop)
Rapid clicking on ruler handles multiple seeks properly
Seeking while playing works without issues
No console errors or warnings detected
ResizeObserver implementation working (no hardcoded 600px width issues)
Keyboard shortcuts work (Space, Escape, R for record)
Timeline zoom and navigation integration with seeking
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
